mapper.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE MenuHierarchy AS (
SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_cd, bbs_oid, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_oid AS root_menu_no, menu_nm AS root_menu_nm, CAST(menu_nm AS CHAR(500)) as menu_path FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE menu_lv = 1 AND menu_type != 'HIDDEN' AND menu_auth_lv = 'COMMON' AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL
SELECT m.menu_oid, m.menu_nm, m.menu_cd, m.bbs_oid, m.up_menu_oid, m.menu_lv, mh.root_menu_no, mh.root_menu_nm, CONCAT(mh.menu_path, ' > ', m.menu_nm) FROM ${schema}.menu m INNER JOIN MenuHierarchy mh ON m.up_menu_oid = mh.menu_oid WHERE m.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT * FROM (
SELECT 'NOTICE' AS bbs_se_cd, n.ntc_oid AS post_id, n.ntc_oid AS noticeNo, NULL AS bbsOid, 'NOTICE' AS menuCd, mh.menu_nm AS menuNm, n.ntc_nm AS title, n.ntc_cn_txt AS content, n.reg_dt AS reg_date, n.inq_cnt AS view_count, mh.menu_path, mh.root_menu_no, mh.root_menu_nm, (MATCH(n.ntc_nm) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) + MATCH(n.ntc_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)) AS score FROM ${schema}.ntc n LEFT JOIN MenuHierarchy mh ON mh.menu_cd = 'NOTICE' WHERE n.use_yn = 'Y' AND n.open_yn = 'Y' AND (MATCH(n.ntc_nm) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) OR MATCH(n.ntc_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)) UNION ALL
SELECT 'POST' AS bbs_se_cd, b.bbs_pst_oid AS post_id, NULL AS noticeNo, b.bbs_oid AS bbsOid, mh.menu_cd AS menuCd, mh.menu_nm AS menuNm, b.bbs_pst_ttl AS title, b.bbs_pst_cn_txt AS content, b.reg_dt AS reg_date, b.inq_cnt AS view_count, mh.menu_path, mh.root_menu_no, mh.root_menu_nm, (MATCH(b.bbs_pst_ttl) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) + MATCH(b.bbs_pst_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)) AS score FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst b INNER JOIN MenuHierarchy mh ON b.bbs_oid = mh.bbs_oid WHERE b.del_yn = 'N' AND (b.prvt_pst_yn = 'N' OR b.prvt_pst_yn IS NULL) AND b.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL AND b.open_yn = 'Y' AND (MATCH(b.bbs_pst_ttl) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) OR MATCH(b.bbs_pst_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)) UNION ALL
SELECT 'FAQ' AS bbs_se_cd, f.faq_dtl_oid AS post_id, NULL AS noticeNo, NULL AS bbsOid, 'FAQ' AS menuCd, mh.menu_nm AS menuNm, f.qstn_cn AS title, f.ans_cn_txt AS content, f.reg_dt AS reg_date, f.inq_cnt AS view_count, mh.menu_path, mh.root_menu_no, mh.root_menu_nm, (MATCH(f.qstn_cn) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) + MATCH(f.ans_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)) AS score FROM ${schema}.faq_dtl f INNER JOIN ${schema}.faq_ctgry fc ON f.faq_ctgry_oid = fc.faq_ctgry_oid AND fc.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN MenuHierarchy mh ON mh.menu_cd = 'FAQ' WHERE f.use_yn = 'Y' AND f.open_yn = 'Y' AND (MATCH(f.qstn_cn) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) OR MATCH(f.ans_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)) UNION ALL
SELECT 'QNA' AS bbs_se_cd, q.qna_oid AS post_id, NULL AS noticeNo, NULL AS bbsOid, 'QNA' AS menuCd, mh.menu_nm AS menuNm, q.qna_ttl AS title, q.qna_cn_txt AS content, q.reg_dt AS reg_date, q.inq_cnt AS view_count, mh.menu_path, mh.root_menu_no, mh.root_menu_nm, (MATCH(q.qna_ttl) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) + MATCH(q.qna_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)) AS score FROM ${schema}.qna q LEFT JOIN MenuHierarchy mh ON mh.menu_cd = 'QNA' WHERE q.use_yn = 'Y' AND prvt_pst_yn = 'N' AND q.up_qna_oid IS NULL AND (MATCH(q.qna_ttl) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) OR MATCH(q.qna_cn_txt) AGAINST(#{ngramKeyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)) ) AS results WHERE score > 0
